caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT" printed on the front, a gold chain, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional studio microphone. He is seated in a room with white walls featuring logos that say "EMPIRE HUSTLE" above stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". A graphic overlay in the lower corners includes a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand while speaking, moving it from an open, elevated position toward the center of his chest. His facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to talk, while his position and the studio equipment remain stationary. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man as he engages in a conversation.
